—

一件衣服。三种人生。
One Garment. Three Lives.

Brand Manifesto / 2026

00 / Invisible / 不可见

不可见 / Invisible

衣服被穿上之前，先被忘记。 Before clothes are worn, they are forgotten. — 不可见原则 / Principle of Invisibility
Margiela 说："匿名对我来说很重要。" Margiela said: "Anonymity is important to me."
我们走得更远。我们追求不可见性——不是隐藏品牌，而是让品牌消失在使用中。 We go further. We pursue invisibility — not hiding the brand, but making it disappear in use.
当你不再意识到你穿了什么，衣服才真正开始工作。 When you are no longer aware of what you are wearing, the garment has truly begun to work.
这不是关于"无品牌"。这是关于品牌作为工具的自我消解。 This is not about "no brand." This is about the brand's self-dissolution as a tool.
最好的衣服是你忘记它的存在，但它依然保护你、支持你、表达你。 The best garment is one you forget exists, yet it continues to protect, support, and express you.
Triple Stitch 的目标是：成为那种被忘记的衣服。 Triple Stitch's goal: to become the kind of clothing that is forgotten.
01 / Manifesto / 宣言

宣言 / Manifesto

我们不为场景设计衣服。我们设计一种人——一种不再需要为场景换衣服的人。 We do not design clothes for occasions. We design a kind of person — one who no longer needs to change clothes for different occasions. — 创始理念 / Founding Principle
早晨九点。会议室。陈述方案。 Nine in the morning. Conference room. Presenting a proposal.
下午六点。网球场。挥拍。 Six in the evening. Tennis court. Swinging a racket.
晚上九点。某个角落。举杯。 Nine at night. Somewhere in the city. Raising a glass.
三个场景。三种身份。一套衣服。 Three settings. Three identities. One outfit.
这不是"多功能"的陈词滥调。这是关于身份的连续性——关于一个男性如何在不同空间中保持自我的完整与从容。 This is not the cliché of "versatility." This is about continuity of identity — how a man maintains his wholeness and composure across different spaces.
真正的风格不是为每个场景准备一套伪装。是找到一种贯穿所有场景的真实表达。 True style is not preparing a disguise for every occasion. It is finding an authentic expression that runs through all of them.
衣服应该让穿着者成为主角，而非品牌。这是我们从 Martin Margiela 那里继承的唯一信念。 Clothes should make the wearer the protagonist, not the brand. This is the only belief we inherited from Martin Margiela.
我们不是 athleisure 品牌。我们不追逐季节趋势。我们不迎合时尚媒体的口味。 We are not an athleisure brand. We do not chase seasonal trends. We do not cater to the taste of fashion media.
我们制造的是工具——帮助男性在生活的各个场景中保持从容的工具。 We make tools — tools that help men remain composed across every scene of life.
一件真正优秀的衣服，可以属于任何场合。 A truly excellent garment can belong to any occasion.
02 / Philosophy / 哲学

哲学 / Philosophy

Martin Margiela 从未谈论过"多场景穿搭"。但他的整个设计哲学——匿名性、解构、反时尚、时间的循环——为我们提供了思想基石。 Martin Margiela never spoke of "multi-scenario dressing." Yet his entire design philosophy — anonymity, deconstruction, anti-fashion, the cycle of time — provided the foundation for our thinking.

匿名性 / Anonymity

Margiela 拒绝成为明星设计师。从不谢幕，从不拍照。品牌的焦点完全转移到衣服本身。 Margiela refused to become a star designer. Never took a bow, never posed for photos. The brand's focus shifted entirely to the clothes themselves.
我们的衣服上没有 logo。没有显眼的品牌标识。 There is no logo on our clothes. No conspicuous branding.
如果你知道，你就知道。 If you know, you know.
标签采用 Margiela 式的四针白线固定，设计为可完全拆卸。保留它，或撕掉它。衣服彻底属于你。 The label is secured with Margiela's signature four white stitches, designed to be fully removable. Keep it, or tear it off. The garment belongs entirely to you.

解构 / Deconstruction

Margiela 的解构不是破坏。是"承认不完美是通往真实的途径"。 Margiela's deconstruction is not destruction. It is "the acknowledgment that imperfection is the path to authenticity."
我们的解构对象是场景边界本身： Our object of deconstruction is the boundary between occasions itself:
  • 西装的剪裁逻辑注入运动裤的廓形 The tailoring logic of a suit injected into the silhouette of sweatpants
  • 网球服的透气面料转化为衬衫的质感 The breathable fabric of tennis wear transformed into the texture of a shirt
  • 正装的精致工艺与运动服的功能性缝合在一起 The refined craft of formalwear stitched together with the functionality of athletic wear
每一件单品都是两种对立语言的对话产物——不是妥协，而是融合。 Every piece is the product of a dialogue between two opposing languages — not compromise, but fusion.

Replica

Margiela 选择经历时间考验的经典款式进行复刻。 Margiela chose classic designs that had withstood the test of time to replicate.
我们选择那些在过去半个世纪中被证明跨越场景的设计——网球毛衣、卡其裤、布雷泽西装——用当代面料和工艺重新诠释。 We select designs proven over the past half-century to transcend occasions — tennis sweaters, chinos, blazers — reinterpreted with contemporary fabrics and craftsmanship.
每件 Replica 单品标注灵感来源与诞生年代。这不是怀旧。这是对时间智慧的致敬。 Each Replica piece is labeled with its source of inspiration and year of origin. This is not nostalgia. It is an homage to the wisdom of time.

反时尚 / Anti-Fashion

Margiela 在停车场和废弃超市里办秀。用素人模特和丝袜面罩对抗超模文化。 Margiela held shows in parking lots and abandoned supermarkets. Used non-models and stockings over faces to combat supermodel culture.
我们拒绝"运动品牌"或"商务品牌"的标签。 We reject the labels of "sportswear brand" or "business brand."
我们制造工具。不是装饰品。 We make tools. Not ornaments.
03 / Atelier / 工坊

工坊 / Atelier

我们不设计"系列"。我们建造原型。 We do not design "collections." We build prototypes.
每一件衣服都从一个问题开始：一个人如何在会议室和网球场之间移动，而不需要换衣服？ Every garment begins with a question: How does a person move between a conference room and a tennis court without changing clothes?
答案不是折中。答案是重新发明。 The answer is not compromise. The answer is reinvention.
我们的工坊没有"成品"。只有处于不同完成阶段的实验。 Our atelier has no "finished products." Only experiments at different stages of completion.
暴露的缝线、未锁边的下摆、临时固定的衬里——这些不是缺陷。这是诚实的证据。 Exposed seams, unfinished hems, temporarily fixed linings — these are not flaws. They are evidence of honesty.
04 / Identity / 识别

识别 / Identity

命名 / Naming

"Triple" 指向三个场景的融合。"Stitch" 指向服装的本质：缝合、连接、工艺。 "Triple" points to the fusion of three settings. "Stitch" points to the essence of clothing: sewing, connection, craft.
在 Margiela 的词典中，缝线是过程的可视化——暴露的缝线让穿着者看到衣服是如何被制造的，让"制作过程"本身成为美学元素。 In Margiela's lexicon, the stitch is the visualization of process — exposed seams let the wearer see how the garment was made, turning "the act of making" itself into an aesthetic element.
三道缝线。三种场景。一个连续的整体。 Three stitches. Three settings. One continuous whole.

编码 / Codes

受 Margiela 0-23 编码系统的启发： Inspired by Margiela's 0-23 coding system:
Code / 编码Series / 系列
00Triple Stitch — 三场景融合系列 / Three-Setting Fusion
01Office Core — 办公核心 / Office Core
02Court Ready — 球场系列 / Court Ready
03Social Hour — 社交系列 / Social Hour
10Accessories — 配饰 / Accessories
11Replica — 经典复刻 / Replica

视觉 DNA / Visual DNA

色彩 / Color

未漂白亚麻。混凝土灰。暖沙色。深藏青。赤陶橙——唯一的运动能量隐喻。 Unbleached linen. Concrete grey. Warm sand. Deep navy. Terracotta — the sole metaphor for athletic energy.

廓形 / Silhouette

Oversized 与精准剪裁的并置。上装偏宽松。下装保持利落线条。 The juxtaposition of oversized and precise tailoring. Tops lean loose. Bottoms maintain clean lines.

面料 / Fabric

暴露的缝线。未完成的边缘。功能性内衬的外露。制作过程即设计语言。 Exposed seams. Unfinished edges. Functional lining turned outward. The making process is the design language.

摄影 / Photography

匿名模特。背影或面部遮挡。建筑空间。自然光。拒绝修饰。 Anonymous models. Back turned or face obscured. Architectural spaces. Natural light. No retouching.
05 / Product / 产品

产品 / Product

5 件单品 / Five Pieces

我们不相信"越多越好"。 We do not believe "more is better."
一个精心设计的 5 件单品组合，可以覆盖男性 80% 的穿着场景。 A carefully designed five-piece ensemble can cover 80% of a man's dressing scenarios.
Item / 单品Setting / 场景Fabric / 面料
The Transit Blazer
变形西装外套 / Transforming Blazer		 办公 / 社交 / 轻运动
Office / Social / Light Sport		 机械弹羊毛混纺，抗皱，四面弹
Mechanical-stretch wool blend, wrinkle-resistant, four-way stretch
The Court Shirt
球场衬衫 / Court Shirt		 办公 / 网球 / 社交
Office / Tennis / Social		 天丝莱赛尔混纺，吸湿排汗
Tencel lyocell blend, moisture-wicking
The Dual Trousers
双生裤 / Dual Trousers		 全场景 / All Settings 咖啡渣再生纤维，防臭，速干
Coffee ground recycled fiber, odor-resistant, quick-dry
The Shift Polo
转场 Polo / Shift Polo		 办公 / 网球 / 健身 / 社交
Office / Tennis / Gym / Social		 海洋塑料再生尼龙，UPF 50+
Ocean plastic recycled nylon, UPF 50+
The Afterhours Knit
午夜针织衫 / Afterhours Knit		 办公 / 社交 / 休闲运动
Office / Social / Casual Sport		 美利奴羊毛 + 天丝，调温
Merino wool + Tencel, temperature-regulating

Replica

每季 3-5 件。从服装史中选择跨越场景的经典设计： Three to five pieces per season. Classic designs from fashion history that transcend occasions:
  • 1970s 意大利网球毛衣 — 粗针棉质，V领，条纹细节 1970s Italian Tennis Sweater — Chunky cotton, V-neck, stripe details
  • 1980s 美式卡其裤 — 高腰直筒，军事面料 1980s American Chinos — High-waisted straight leg, military fabric
  • 1990s 极简西装 — 单扣，无垫肩，垂坠感面料 1990s Minimalist Suit — Single-breasted, unpadded, draped fabric

面料承诺 / Fabric Promise

  • 抗皱 + 弹力 + 透气 — 每一件单品必须同时满足 Wrinkle-resistant + Stretch + Breathable — every piece must satisfy all three
  • OEKO-TEX Standard 100 认证 OEKO-TEX Standard 100 certified
  • 优先使用再生纤维、天丝、有机棉 Priority given to recycled fibers, Tencel, organic cotton
  • 每件单品标注面料成分、功能技术和护理指南 Every piece labeled with fabric composition, technical features, and care instructions
06 / Market / 市场

市场 / Market

人群 / Audience

"场景穿梭者"——28-40 岁，一线和新一线城市，工作日程紧凑，生活方式多元。 "Setting Shifters" — aged 28-40, first and new-tier cities, tight work schedules, diverse lifestyles.
同一天内经历会议、健身和约会。不愿意为每个场景准备一套衣服。 Experiencing meetings, workouts, and dates within the same day. Unwilling to prepare a separate outfit for each occasion.

空白 / The Gap

  • Lululemon / Alo — 聚焦女性，男性是附属品 Lululemon / Alo — Female-focused, men's line is an afterthought
  • On Running — 跑步基因过强，商务渗透不足 On Running — Too running-centric, insufficient business penetration
  • Ralph Lauren — 老钱风，运动元素是装饰 Ralph Lauren — Old money aesthetic, athletic elements are decorative
  • J.Lindeberg — 高尔夫/网球过专，日常化不足 J.Lindeberg — Too golf/tennis-specific, insufficient everyday wearability
  • 传统商务品牌 — 功能性为零 Traditional business brands — Zero functionality
真正理解男性多场景需求的品牌，目前不存在。 A brand that truly understands men's multi-scenario needs does not currently exist.

定价 / Pricing

Category / 品类Price / 价格区间 (RMB)
核心单品 / Core Items1,200 - 2,800
运动融合单品 / Sport-Fusion Items600 - 1,200
Replica 系列 / Replica Series1,500 - 3,500
配饰 / Accessories800 - 2,000
以面料科技和场景多功能性支撑溢价。不陷入价格战。 Premium supported by fabric technology and multi-scenario versatility. No price wars.
07 / Experience / 体验

体验 / Experience

空间 / Space

门店不是服装店。是场景实验室。 The store is not a clothing shop. It is a setting laboratory.
  • The Office — 办公场景产品展示 The Office — Product display in an office setting
  • The Court — 网球/健身体验区 The Court — Tennis / fitness experience zone
  • The Lounge — 社交休息区，咖啡与沙龙 The Lounge — Social lounge, coffee and salon
选择非传统商业空间——旧工厂、停车场、社区建筑。零售空间本身成为文化事件。 Non-traditional commercial spaces — old factories, parking lots, community buildings. The retail space itself becomes a cultural event.

社群 / Community

不是会员体系。是俱乐部。 Not a membership system. A club.
  • 每周网球社交局——穿着 Triple Stitch 即可免费参与 Weekly tennis socials — free entry wearing Triple Stitch
  • 每月"场景穿梭"城市骑行——验证跨场景能力 Monthly "setting shift" city cycling — testing cross-scenario capability
  • 每季 Replica 发布晚宴——顾客共同讨论下一季方向 Seasonal Replica launch dinner — customers discuss next season's direction together

内容 / Content

匿名原则。不使用明星代言人。使用真实的场景穿梭者——面部可以被遮挡，故事才是主角。 Anonymity principle. No celebrity endorsers. Real setting shifters — faces may be obscured, the story is the protagonist.
产品即内容。每件衣服的功能设计本身就是最好的故事。 Product is content. The functional design of each garment is the best story in itself.

发布 / Launch

反秀场。 Anti-runway.
  • 在真实办公楼举办"24小时穿着实验" "24-hour wear experiment" in a real office building
  • 在网球俱乐部举办"从球场到酒吧"无缝转场 "From court to bar" seamless transition at a tennis club
  • 在城市公共交通上举办"通勤穿搭"快闪 "Commute dressing" flash mob on public transport
发布即体验。体验即传播。 Launch is experience. Experience is transmission.
08 / Future / 未来

未来 / Future

最终，Triple Stitch 希望成为一种生活方式的同义词——不是因为你穿了我们的衣服，而是因为你不再需要为衣服思考。 Ultimately, Triple Stitch hopes to become a synonym for a way of life — not because you wear our clothes, but because you no longer need to think about clothes. — 品牌愿景 / Brand Vision

三年 / Three Years

  • Year 1 — 上海首店 + 线上 DTC。核心 5 件单品认知。社群 5,000 人。 Year 1 — Shanghai flagship + online DTC. Core five-piece recognition. Community of 5,000.
  • Year 2 — 北京、深圳、成都。6 家门店。首个 Replica 系列。社群 20,000 人。 Year 2 — Beijing, Shenzhen, Chengdu. Six stores. First Replica collection. Community of 20,000.
  • Year 3 — 杭州、南京、武汉。12 家门店。女性产品线。东京、首尔探索。 Year 3 — Hangzhou, Nanjing, Wuhan. Twelve stores. Women's line. Tokyo, Seoul exploration.

使命 / Mission

消灭"换装焦虑"。 Eliminate "outfit anxiety."
当一件衣服足够好、足够真实、足够懂你，你就不再需要为不同场景准备不同的自己。 When a garment is good enough, real enough, understands you enough, you no longer need to prepare different versions of yourself for different settings.
从 Margiela 那里，我们学会了匿名与真实。从当代生活中，我们学会了融合与流动。 From Margiela, we learned anonymity and authenticity. From contemporary life, we learned fusion and fluidity.
Triple Stitch 是这两种智慧的交汇——一件衣服。三种人生。一个真实的自己。 Triple Stitch is the intersection of these two wisdoms — one garment. three lives. one authentic self.

—

One Garment.
Three Lives.

References / 参考

  4. GetIt01, "Maison Martin Margiela 1994-1996: Replica系列到底在復刻什麼?" https://www.getit01.com/p20180425055236241/
